title: Building Search for AI Agents with Exa CEO Will Bryk
content: Sarah Wang interviews Exa CEO Will Bryk about building search infrastructure for AI agents. They discuss why traditional search engines fail for autonomous systems, how retrieval and agent workflows differ from human search, and why search may become foundational to the agent economy. Bryk also addresses AI-native products, information discovery, and reframing technology problems as search problems.

title: 芯片股暴跌拖累美股，纳指重挫超1,100点
content: U.S. stocks plunged Friday as chip stocks dragged markets down. The Nasdaq Composite plummeted over 1,100 points, marking its worst single-day performance in more than a year. The sell-off was driven by concerns over rising interest rates and doubts about AI spending, abruptly ending weeks of sustained gains on Wall Street.

title: 2026 06 06 HackerNews
content: S&P Dow Jones maintains a 12-month waiting period for large IPOs like SpaceX to enter benchmark indices, bucking competitors' shorter timelines. The Ladybird browser project ends public pull requests due to AI-generated spam threatening security and quality. Anthropic open-sources a reference framework for autonomous AI-powered vulnerability discovery, defaulting to C/C++ memory flaws with sandboxed execution. The New York Times uses non-unsubscribable marketing emails, drawing criticism for desperate trust-eroding tactics. A new documentary traces C++'s 40-year evolution and notes its strong growth. Researchers traced GNSS interference over Europe to Russian Molniya-orbit satellites since 2019. ISS astronauts temporarily sheltered in a cargo craft during Russian module air leak repairs but have safely returned. Meta's smart glasses app contains hidden facial recognition infrastructure, ready for activation. The UK switched GOV.UK Pay from Stripe to Adyen, adding bank transfer options. Meta enabled A
eventKey: 2026-hackernews
normalizedTitle: 2026 06 06 hackernews

title: 姚顺雨：需要建立长期 AGI 组织 ，腾讯 AI 下半场主攻三方向
content: Tencent's chief AI scientist Yao Shunyu stated at the Tencent AI Industry Summit that the most important task for the next phase of AI is to establish a long-term AGI organization in China. Tencent AI will focus on three directions: optimizing foundational work like pre-training and post-training; converting basic technology into practical products that create value for society; and actively exploring new research paradigms to uncover new opportunities.
eventKey: 姚顺雨-需要建立长期-agi-下半场主攻三方向
normalizedTitle: 姚顺雨 需要建立长期 agi 组织 腾讯 ai 下半场主攻三方向

title: 腾讯高管：今年腾讯大部分代码都由 AI 生成
content: Tencent Senior Executive Vice President Tang Daosheng stated at a conference that most of Tencent's code this year is generated by AI. Engineers now focus primarily on architecture design rather than writing code themselves, with their role shifting to periodically guiding and correcting AI-generated code.
eventKey: 腾讯高管-今年腾讯大部分代码都由
normalizedTitle: 腾讯高管 今年腾讯大部分代码都由 ai 生成

title: 英伟达官宣推出全球首款完全开放的全模态物理 AI 模型 NVIDIA Cosmos 3
content: Nvidia announced Cosmos 3, the world's first fully open multimodal physical AI model, at GTC 2026 in Taipei. Built on a novel hybrid Transformer architecture, it integrates visual reasoning, world generation, and action prediction. Nvidia also launched the Cosmos Coalition to advance open-world model development with global research teams, accelerating large-scale deployment of physical AI.
eventKey: 英伟达官宣推出全球首款完全开放的全模态物理-nvidia-cosmos

title: 抖音副总裁李亮回应「豆包误判蘑菇导致用户中毒」：AI 的回答仅供参考
content: Douyin VP Li Liang responded to reports that AI app Doubao misidentified a mushroom, leading to user poisoning. He stated Doubao actually identified it as "chicken leg mushroom" with warnings about confusion with toxic lookalikes and advised against eating wild mushrooms. He emphasized AI answers are for reference only, urging users to consult multiple sources for safety-critical matters, and warned that even non-toxic plants may contain pesticides.
eventKey: 抖音副总裁李亮回应「豆包误判蘑菇导致用户中毒」-的回答仅供参考

title: Aifei 发布，世界首个 AI Coding 框架
content:
Aifei 是世界首个 AI Coding 框架。 Aifei 不是在传统框架之上增加 AI 用法，而是从框架结构本身出发，围绕大模型理解、生成和维护代码的方式，重新设计 Java 服务端开发。

过去三年，AI 写代码的能力快速跃升。代码生成正在从“辅助”走向“主导…
